query:
SELECT 
  section,
  entity,
  status,
  triggered_by,
  started_at,
  finished_at,
  current_stage,
  progress,
  row_count,
  error_message
FROM sync_logs
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT 
  section,
  entity,
  status,
  triggered_by,
  started_at,
  finished_at,
  current_stage,
  progress,
  row_count,
  error_message
FROM sync_logs
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
